title: Petrol, Diesel Price Today LIVE Updates: 'Poll promises, then attacks on public's pocket', Rahul Gandhi slams Modi
description: Petrol Price Today LIVE Updates: In Delhi, the price of petrol has been increased by Rs. 2.61 from ₹99.51 to ₹102.12 per litre, while diesel prices have gone up by Rs. 2.71 from ₹92.49 to ₹95.20 per litre.
